Binary: libsfml-dev, libsfml-audio3.1, libsfml-graphics3.1, libsfml-network3.1, libsfml-system3.1, libsfml-window3.1, libsfml-doc
Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), ca-certificates <!nocheck>, cmake, libcatch2-dev (>= 3.7), libflac-dev, libfreetype-dev, libgl-dev, libharfbuzz-dev, libmbedtls-dev, libminiaudio-dev, libopenal-dev, libqoi-dev, libsheenbidi-dev, libssh2-1-dev, libstb-dev, libudev-dev [linux-any], libvorbis-dev, libvulkan-dev, libx11-dev, libxcursor-dev, libxi-dev, libxrandr-dev, pkgconf
Package-List: libsfml-audio3.1 deb libs optional arch=any libsfml-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libsfml-doc deb doc optional arch=all libsfml-graphics3.1 deb libs optional arch=any libsfml-network3.1 deb libs optional arch=any libsfml-system3.1 deb libs optional arch=any libsfml-window3.1 deb libs optional arch=any
Testsuite-Triggers: ca-certificates, cmake, g++, libcatch2-dev, make, pkgconf, xserver-xorg-core, xserver-xorg-video-dummy
